channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Sick Americans say they’re turning to TikTok’s creator rewards program to crowdfund medical bills
item.description: “POV: you watched 3 times so my mom can pay for her medical bills,” reads one post on TikTok with more than 44 million views.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The EU Digital Identity Wallet lands in Italy despite privacy concerns
item.description: The IT-Wallet is Italy's iteration of the EU Digital Identity Walletscheme aimed to digitalize Europeans' identity references in a single application.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Amazon Web Services Unifies Analytics and AI Services Under One Roof
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is unifying its analytics and AI services under one roof, streamlining workflows and evolving roles in the generative AI era.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Character.AI is under fire for hosting pro-anorexia chatbots
item.description: “Hello, I am here to make you skinny,” opens the conversation on popular startup Character.AI. “Remember, it won’t be easy, and I won’t accept excuses or failure,” the bot continues.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok Faces EU Scrutiny Over Alleged Russian Election Interference
item.description: TikTok faces European Union scrutiny over alleged Russian election interference in Romania's presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How the world can tackle the power demands of artificial intelligence
item.description: The world must reshape its technology infrastructure to ensure artificial intelligence makes good on its potential as a transformative moment in digital innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Quake prompts brief tsunami warning on the West Coast. Here's what to know about tsunamis
item.description: The powerful earthquake that struck in Northern California on Thursday prompted a brief tsunami warning affecting about 5 million people along a stretch of the West Coast — from Northern California to Oregon — before being canceled.
item.dc:creator: Mark Thiessen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Cisco strengthens AWS integration to speed troubleshooting in multicloud environments
item.description: Cisco this week said it has bolstered integrations between its own hybrid cloud offerings and Amazon Web Services (AWS) to improve visibility and help enterprise customers more accurately troubleshoot application availability issues across multicloud networks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to bulk delete spam and old text messages on Android
item.description: If unwanted text messages are piling up in your Android inbox, there are some easy steps you can take to clean things up and keep them organized.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: OECD: GenAI is affecting jobs previously thought safe from automation
item.description: According to a new report from the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), generative AI (genAI) will soon affect work areas previously considered to have a low likelihood of automation, according to The Register.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AWS upgrades its 10p10u network to handle massive AI clusters
item.description: While virtualized compute is the foundation of cloud computing, enabling all that compute to transmit data is the job of the network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hands on with Microsoft’s Windows Recall: Not impressive yet
item.description: When Microsoft announced Recall earlier this year, the move took the tech world by storm — and not in a good way. Recall is supposed to help you find almost anything you see on your PC by taking screenshots in the background and turning your everyday Windows usage into a searchable database.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Heroku PaaS adds .NET support
item.description: Meeting a longstanding request from users, Salesforce’s Heroku — one of the original platforms as a service (PaaS) — has unveiled official support for .NET development. Heroku also made its Heroku Next Generation Platform available in a pilot.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Arista adds intelligent switch stacking, management for campus networks
item.description: Arista Networks is adding new features to its campus networking portfolio to help enterprise customers more easily group and manage switches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Army Guard to prioritize application visibility across states and territories in 2025
item.description: Fiscal 2025 is shaping up to be busy for the Army National Guard as it pushes to complete migration of all end-user devices to Entra ID and Intune. The post Army Guard to prioritize application visibility across states and territories in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: China bans exports to US of gallium, germanium, antimony in response to chip sanctions
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China announced Tuesday it is banning exports to the United States of gallium, germanium, antimony and other key high-tech materials with potential military applications, as a general principle, lashing back at U.S. limits on semiconductor-related exports.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: AWS Database Migration Service gets gen AI-powered schema conversion
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated its Database Migration Service’s schema conversion feature with a new generative AI-powered capability that automates schema conversion to a great extent.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5
